assessment.note: She names a specific communication gap — framing tradeoffs clearly for stakeholders — which is a positive clarity signal; no wellbeing signal in the answer. [THREAD-DEFERRED] Concrete thread 'tighter narrative on tradeoffs' not followed because drill cap requires advancing the arc.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff pattern
new_queue.name: What do you usually trade off first when pressure rises?
new_queue.description: Surfaces her default judgment under pressure and what gets sacrificed.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to do differently in the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete behavior change and near-term commitment.
